papers.title_en: Collaborative cross-modal fusion network for medical report generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对自动医疗报告生成任务，提出了一种协作式跨模态融合网络。该任务旨在将医学图像转化为临床一致的文本描述，是医学图像分析和临床决策支持中的关键环节。通过优化图像与文本特征的协同融合，该方法显著提升了生成报告的准确性与专业性，为提高放射科工作效率提供了技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Automated medical report generation aims to translate medical images into clinicallycoherent textual descriptions. It has emerged as a critical task in medical imageanalysis and clinical decision support, with the potential to improve diagnostic …

papers.title_en: BiMaxKAN: A KAN-based dual-branch network for medical image segmentation with interpretability analysis
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中泛化能力有限、边界分割不精准及模型缺乏可解释性等挑战，本文提出了一种基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）的双分支网络架构BiMaxKAN。该模型通过双分支设计捕捉多尺度特征，并利用KAN的非线性建模能力提升边界处理效果。实验证明，BiMaxKAN在多个医学影像数据集上表现优异，且具备更强的可解释性，为精准医疗诊断提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Deep-learning-based approaches for medical image segmentation have maderemarkable achievements. However, existing approaches still suffer from limitedgeneralization capability, insufficient boundary segmentation performance and poor …

In recent years, deep learning technologies have been widely applied in medicalimage analysis, demonstrating outstanding performance particularly in imagesegmentation tasks. To address the issue of semantic information loss during the …

papers.title_en: CT-based radiomics improves survival prediction in colorectal liver metastases: beyond clinical scores
papers.tldr: 本研究针对结直肠癌肝转移（CRLM）患者术后生存预测准确性不足的问题，提出了一种基于CT影像组学的方法。通过提取CT图像中的定量特征并结合传统临床评分，研究者开发了新的预后模型。结果表明，该模型在预测患者生存期方面显著优于现有的临床评分系统，为优化手术候选者筛选和制定个体化围手术期治疗方案提供了更精准的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Surgery with perioperative chemotherapy offers a potentially curative treatment forcolorectal liver metastases (CRLM). Selection of candidates for resection relies onsurvival prediction, but available prognostic factors have limited reliability. This study …

papers.title_en: [18F] FDG PET/CT Radiomics for Predicting Pathological Risk Subtypes of Thymic Epithelial Tumors: A Bicentric Study
papers.tldr: 本研究开发并评估了一个基于基线 18F-FDG PET 影像组学的患者级框架，旨在通过聚合多个受累淋巴结的特征来区分霍奇金淋巴瘤（HL）与非霍奇金淋巴瘤（NHL）。该双中心研究利用放射组学描述符，为淋巴瘤的病理亚型鉴别提供了一种无创且高效的辅助诊断手段。
papers.abstract_en: Objective: Develop and evaluate a patient-level framework for discriminatingHodgkin lymphoma (HL) from non-Hodgkin lymphoma (NHL) on baseline 18F-FDGPET by aggregating radiomic descriptors from a variable number of involved lymph …

papers.title_en: Revisiting multi-nodal radiomics with advanced feature learning for lymphoma classification: a multi-center study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对霍奇金淋巴瘤（HL）与非霍奇金淋巴瘤（NHL）的鉴别诊断，提出了一种基于基线18F-FDG PET影像的多节点放射组学分析框架。通过聚合患者体内多个受累淋巴结的放射组学特征，该框架克服了以往研究仅关注单一病灶的局限性。这项多中心研究利用先进的特征学习技术，显著提升了患者层面的分类准确性，为淋巴瘤的精准分型提供了有效的辅助诊断工具。
papers.abstract_en: Objective: Develop and evaluate a patient-level framework for discriminatingHodgkin lymphoma (HL) from non-Hodgkin lymphoma (NHL) on baseline 18F-FDGPET by aggregating radiomic descriptors from a variable number of involved lymph …

papers.title_en: nnU-Net-based whole-coronary pericoronary adipose tissue radiomics combined with clinical factors for predicting coronary plaque development in individuals with …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对冠状动脉疾病早期预测的难题，提出了一种基于nnU-Net的自动化分析方法。通过提取全冠状动脉周脂肪（PCAT）的影像组学特征，并将其与临床因素相结合，构建了斑块发育预测模型。研究结果表明，该多模态方法能显著提升预测准确性，为临床早期干预和风险分层提供了重要的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background Effective early prediction of coronary artery disease remainschallenging. This study aims to investigate whether radiomic features of pericoronaryadipose tissue (PCAT) derived from the whole-coronary tree using nnU-Net …

papers.title_en: A Promptable 3D-CT Foundation Model-Based Approach for Pulmonary Embolism: K. Floch et al.: A Promptable 3D-CT Foundation Model-Based Approach for …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺栓塞（PE）严重程度评估中血栓体积（BCV）手动测量耗时耗力的问题，提出了一种基于可提示（Promptable）3D-CT基础模型的自动化分割方法。该方法利用先进的深度学习架构，通过交互式提示实现对CT血管造影（CTA）中血栓的精确量化，显著提升了BCV这一重要生物标志物的计算效率，为临床快速评估PE风险提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose Blood clot volume (BCV), defined as the total three-dimensional (3D)volume of the thrombus on computed tomography angiography (CTA), is an objectivebiomarker of pulmonary embolism (PE) severity whose clinical use is limited by time …

papers.title_en: Machine learning of multiparametric MRI radiomics preoperatively distinguishes testicular seminoma from non-seminoma: a multicenter study
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在利用多参数MRI影像组学结合机器学习技术，开发一种能够术前区分睾丸生殖细胞瘤中精原细胞瘤与非精原细胞瘤的预测模型。通过多中心数据验证，研究对比了多种机器学习分类器的性能，最终构建出最优模型。该研究为睾丸肿瘤的精准术前诊断和个体化治疗方案的选择提供了重要的影像学辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: Rationale and objectives This study aims to develop an optimal model fordistinguishing seminoma from non-seminoma testicular tumors using machinelearning classifiers based on multiparametric MRI radiomics. Materials and methods …

papers.title_en: Dynamic multimodal radiomic model for survival prediction in cervical cancer: a multi-cohort study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对局部晚期宫颈癌（LACC）生存预测中忽视治疗期间肿瘤动态变化的问题，开发并验证了一种动态多模态影像组学模型。通过整合治疗前后的多源影像数据，该模型在多中心队列中展现了优于传统静态模型的预测性能，为实现个体化放射治疗提供了重要的决策支持工具。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate survival prediction is critical for guiding individualized radiotherapy inlocally advanced cervical cancer (LACC), yet most existing models rely solely on pre-treatment imaging and overlook tumor changes during therapy. In this study, we …

papers.title_en: Explainable Incremental-Value Analysis of Apparent Diffusion Coefficient and Arterial Spin Labeling Radiomics for ATRX Status Prediction in Glioblastoma
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用表观扩散系数（ADC）和动脉自旋标记（ASL）影像组学特征预测胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）中ATRX基因突变状态的价值。通过构建可解释的增量价值分析模型，研究证明了结合多模态影像特征能显著提高预测ATRX状态的准确性。该方法为GBM的分子亚型识别提供了一种无创且具有临床解释性的影像学评估手段，有助于优化患者的个体化治疗方案。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Alpha-thalassemia/mental retardation syndrome X-linked (ATRX)mutation is an uncommon but biologically relevant molecular feature in glioblastoma(GBM), linked to tumor heterogeneity, DNA damage response pathways, and …

papers.title_en: Multimodal PET/CT-based PD-L1 status prediction in lung cancer via semi-supervised and unsupervised deep learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺癌PD-L1表达状态预测，提出了一种基于18FDG PET/CT多模态影像的深度学习框架。通过结合半监督和无监督学习方法，该研究旨在克服医学影像标注数据不足的挑战，提高预测的准确性与鲁棒性。该方法在肺癌筛查、药物疗效评估和预后预测方面具有重要应用价值，为临床免疫治疗决策提供了一种非侵入性的辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning (DL) techniques have been applied in lung cancer screening,assessing drug effectiveness, and enhancing prognosis prediction. Within thiscontext, the combination of 18FDG PET/CT images with DL has demonstrated …

papers.title_en: Metformin and renal dosimetry in patients undergoing [177Lu] Lu-PSMA therapy: reduced kidney absorbed dose without impact on tumor dosimetry
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了二甲双胍对接受[177Lu]Lu-PSMA治疗的前列腺癌患者肾脏辐射剂量的影响。针对PSMA放射性药物治疗中肾脏辐射暴露这一主要安全隐患，研究发现二甲双胍能显著降低肾脏的吸收剂量，且不会对肿瘤的剂量学产生负面影响。这一发现为提高PSMA治疗的安全性提供了潜在的临床策略，有助于在保护肾功能的同时维持治疗效果。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose Prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA)-targeted radiopharmaceuticaltherapy (RPT) is an established treatment for advanced prostate cancer, but renalradiation exposure remains a major safety concern, as no clinically established …

papers.title_en: MoRGen: Mixture-of-Resolutions Generative Forecasting for Irregularly Sampled Medical Time-Series Data
papers.tldr: 针对不规则采样的临床时间序列数据，传统的自回归生成模型通常采用单一的细粒度时间离散化方案，限制了模型捕捉多尺度特征的能力。本文提出了 MoRGen，一种混合分辨率生成预测模型。该模型通过结合不同时间分辨率的表示，能够更有效地处理医疗数据中的不规则性，并在零样本风险预测任务中表现出色，为临床决策提供了更精准的生成式预测工具。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive generative models for irregularly sampled clinical time-series dataare increasingly used for zero-shot risk forecasting. Prior work typically adopts asingle fine-grained discretization of time, where tokens are generated at one fixed …

papers.title_en: Multi-view Chest X-Ray Vision-Language Pre-training via Semantic-Aware Masked Language Modeling and High-order Alignment
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线影像诊断，提出了一种创新的多视图视觉语言预训练（VLP）框架。该框架通过引入语义感知掩码语言建模和高阶对齐机制，有效解决了现有方法在处理多视图数据和复杂医报关联时的不足。实验证明，该方法显著提升了图像与文本的联合表示质量，在多项医学影像分析任务中表现优异，为临床辅助诊断提供了更精准的特征表示。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-Ray Vision-Language pretraining (VLP) leverages large-scale radiograph-report pairs to develop joint image-text representations, demonstrating significantpotential for medical image diagnosis. However, existing VLP approaches often …

papers.title_en: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在异构数据训练中难以平衡收敛速度与领域覆盖的问题，提出了一种基于分区拟阵约束梯度匹配的小批量选择算法。该方法通过在满足各领域比例约束的前提下，寻找与全量数据梯度最匹配的样本子集，从而在保证数据多样性的同时加速模型收敛。实验证明，该方法能有效提升LLM的训练效率和跨领域泛化能力。
papers.abstract_en: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selectingminibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains.Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on …

papers.title_en: POLIA: Policy Optimization with Visual-Object-Level Intrinsic Advantage for Multimodal Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大模型在推理过程中因缺乏对视觉信息充分建模而导致的幻觉问题，提出了POLIA框架。该方法通过引入视觉对象层级的内在优势（Intrinsic Advantage）来优化策略，旨在增强模型对多模态信息的理解与利用。POLIA在强化学习框架下，通过细粒度的视觉反馈引导模型推理，显著提升了多模态推理的准确性并减少了幻觉现象，为多模态推理任务提供了新的优化路径。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in group-based reinforcement learning (RL) greatly improve LLMs'ability in text reasoning. Yet, these methods lack sufficient modeling of multimodalinformation, leading to significant reasoning hallucination. In this work, we propose …

papers.title_en: Beyond Inconsistent Reasoning: Intermediate Process Direct Preference Optimization on Small Multi-modal Large Language Models for Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对小型多模态大模型（Small MLLMs）在视觉问答中推理过程与结果不一致的问题，提出了中间过程直接偏好优化（IP-DPO）方法。该方法通过对推理链中的中间步骤进行细粒度的偏好建模，引导模型生成逻辑严密且与最终答案一致的推理路径。实验证明，IP-DPO能显著提升小型模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的准确性与逻辑一致性，为增强轻量化模型的可解释性提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has increasingly shifted from direct prediction tostep-by-step reasoning, driven by advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models(MLLMs) and Multi-modal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT). However, small MLLMs (S …

papers.title_en: Towards Multimodal Large Language Models with Both Training and Inference Efficiency
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在训练与推理效率之间难以兼得的问题，本文探讨了如何平衡嵌入空间对齐（如LLaVA）与交叉注意力机制的优劣。研究提出了一种兼顾两者优势的新方案，旨在降低推理开销的同时保持高效的训练过程，为构建高性能且实用的多模态模型提供了新思路和技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) mainly fall into two architectures, eachinvolving a trade-off between training and inference efficiency: embedding spacealignment (eg LLaVA series) is inefficient during inference, while cross-attention …

papers.title_en: Hallucination Detection and Correction in Medical VLMs via Counter-Evidence Verification
papers.tldr: 针对医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）在诊断中存在的幻觉问题，本文提出了一种基于反证验证（Counter-Evidence Verification）的新型检测与修正框架。该方法通过主动寻找与生成内容相矛盾的证据来识别并纠正事实错误，旨在提升医疗AI在临床应用中的可靠性与可信度，为构建更安全的辅助诊断系统提供了重要技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-Language models (VLMs) reliability in medical diagnosis is challenged bytrust-undermining hallucinations. Existing hallucination detection approaches mainlyfocus on identifying factual inconsistencies between generated text and reference …

papers.title_en: AMALIA-VL: A Native European Portuguese Open-Source Vision and Language Model
papers.tldr: 针对现有开源多模态模型在欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）支持上的严重缺失（常与巴西葡语混淆），本文推出了AMALIA-VL。这是首个专门针对欧洲葡语设计的原生开源视觉语言模型。该研究通过构建高质量的本地化数据集并进行针对性训练，填补了该语种在多模态AI领域的空白，为pt-PT社区提供了更精准的视觉理解与语言生成能力。
papers.abstract_en: Large Vision and Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced rapidly, yet EuropeanPortuguese (pt-PT) remains systematically underserved by existing open-sourcemultimodal models, which either conflate it with Brazilian Portuguese or severely …

papers.title_en: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对现有自回归多模态大模型在区域感知任务中效率受限的问题，本文提出了 PerceptionDLM。该模型利用多模态扩散语言模型实现了并行的区域感知，能够同时处理多个视觉区域的描述任务。实验表明，PerceptionDLM 在保持高精度视觉理解的同时，显著提升了推理效率，为高效的多模态感知提供了全新的并行生成范式。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress invisual understanding tasks. However, most existing MLLMs rely on autoregressivegeneration, which limits their efficiency for perception tasks that require captioning …

papers.title_en: E-MRL: Cross-view Aligned Evidence-driven Multimodal Reinforcement Learning for Reliable 3D Tumor Analysis
papers.tldr: 针对视觉语言模型在3D CT医疗报告生成中存在的视觉幻觉和缺乏空间定位能力的问题，本文提出了一种名为E-MRL的跨视图对齐证据驱动多模态强化学习框架。该方法通过整合跨视图对齐机制和证据驱动的奖励函数，显著提升了模型在3D肿瘤分析中的可靠性与报告生成的准确性，为实现可信的自动化医疗诊断提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) show great promise in volumetric medicalreport generation, they frequently suffer from visual hallucinations and a lack ofgrounding in 3D CT data. Current Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement …

papers.title_en: Cross-Attention Multimodal Learning for Predicting Response to Neoadjuvant Imatinib in Gastrointestinal Stromal Tumors: A Multicenter Retrospective Study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胃肠道间质瘤（GIST）对新辅助伊马替尼治疗反应难以预测的临床痛点，提出了一种基于交叉注意力机制的可解释多模态学习模型。通过整合多中心回顾性数据，该模型能够有效预测患者的治疗反应，其性能优于传统单一模态方法。该研究不仅提升了预测准确性，还通过可解释性分析为临床决策提供了科学依据，助力GIST的精准医疗。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Response to neoadjuvant imatinib in gastrointestinal stromal tumors(GISTs) is highly variable and cannot be reliably predicted using current clinical ormolecular markers. This study developed and evaluated an explainable multimodal …

papers.title_en: Enhancing Brain MRI Anomaly Detection and Reasoning with ROI Rethink and Synthetic Data
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学视觉语言模型在脑部MRI异常检测中缺乏空间定位和推理依据的问题，提出了“ROI Rethink”机制和合成数据增强方法。通过引入感兴趣区域（ROI）的重新审视，模型能够更准确地识别异常区域并提供诊断依据。该方法显著提升了模型在异常检测中的空间对齐能力和推理透明度，为临床诊断提供了更具可解释性的支持。
papers.abstract_en: Medical vision-language models typically generate diagnoses through single-passinference without indicating which image regions support their conclusions. This lackof spatial grounding limits clinical utility: outputs cannot be audited, and models may …

papers.title_en: KARLA: Knowledge-base Augmented Retrieval for Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出KARLA，一种知识库增强的检索方法，旨在使大语言模型在生成过程中能自动从外部知识库提取事实信息。该方法解决了模型知识滞后和更新成本高的问题，允许在不重新训练的情况下更新模型输出的事实知识，显著提升了生成内容的准确性与时效性，是增强LLM事实可靠性的重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: We propose a new method that allows an LLM to automatically pull in factualknowledge from a knowledge base during token generation. This means that (1)~factual knowledge in the LLM output can be updated without retraining the LLM,(2) …
